recipient.name: Alston Grinnell, PMP
recipient.title: Manager, Global Employee Experience at Axon

outreach.linkedin_note: Hi Alston, I just applied to the Employee Experience Program Manager role on your Culture team and wanted to connect. EX and onboarding program work is where I've spent my career, and I'd love to hear what the team's day-to-day looks like.

email.subject: Applied to the Employee Experience Program Manager role on your team
email.body:
Hi Alston,

I just applied to the Employee Experience Program Manager role on Axon's Culture team, and I wanted to reach out personally since you'd be leading the work.

What drew me in is how much of the role is hands-on program building across the employee journey — onboarding, engagement, and the moments that shape how people experience the company day to day. That's been the heart of my work: I rebuilt an onboarding program that cut new-hire ramp time by 75% across 70+ staff, and I run 20+ enablement programs end to end with 10+ vendors. With an MS in Applied Organizational Psychology, the "why people stay and thrive" side is what I think about constantly.

I'd love to learn what the EX team's day-to-day actually looks like and what you're focused on this year. I have some open time over the next two weeks if a quick call would be easy — happy to work around your schedule, or to just trade notes by email.

Thanks for considering it, and congrats on the team you're building.

Best,
Jamie (Yi-Chieh) Cheng
jamiecheng0103@gmail.com
